title: Xi makes cryptic comment to Putin as Ukraine gets hit with missiles
description: “Now there are changes that haven’t happened in 100 years. When we are together, we drive these changes,” Xi said.
keywords: News, ukraine war, vladimir putin, Volodymyr Zelensky, xi jinping
snippet:
Chinese President Xi Jinping departed Russia Wednesday, leaving President Vladimir Putin with a puzzling parting message about the power of their relationship.
